zh.Arundel Castle, Arundel, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Prescott於1132年出生在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾 卡素時，她的父親Sir Richard Prescott32歲，母親Martha Ishman22歲。她於大約1151年與Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1178年在英國爾達頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Prescott于1132年出生在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Richard Prescott32岁，母亲Martha Ishman22岁。她于大约1151年与Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1178年在英国爾達頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Prescott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called, in southwestern Lancashire (now Merseyside), Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, Shropshire, and Devon, all of which are named from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + cot ‘cottage’, ‘dwelling’. The surname is most common in Lancashire, and so it seems likely that the first of these places is the most frequent source. It is also present in Ireland, being recorded there first in the 15th century.

History: John Prescott of Standish, Lancaster, England, arrived in NewEngland in 1640 and in 1643 was one of the first settlers ofLancaster, MA. His descendants include several prominent Americans ofthe revolutionary war, including Samuel Prescott, born in Concord, MA,in 1751, whose fame lies in completing the midnight ride of warning in1775 after Paul Revere was captured.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Prescott was born in 1132, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Prescott, was 32 and her mother, Martha Ishman, was 22. She married Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton about 1151, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1178, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Prescott est née en 1132, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Prescott, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Martha Ishman, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton environ 1151, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1178, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ja.Arundel Castle, Arundel, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックスアルンデル カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Prescottが1132年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Prescottは32歳，母Martha Ishmanは22歳であった。約1151年にイギリスチェシュアイアでSir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1178年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Prescott(이)가 1132년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Prescott(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Ishman(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1151년 영국 체실르에서 Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Prescott родилась в 1132 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Prescott было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Martha Ishman, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton около 1151 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1178 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
